# AstroIntelli Technologies

> Embedded systems, Edge AI, and AIoT product development for industrial and healthcare innovators — from concept to scaled deployment.

AstroIntelli engineers the full stack of connected intelligent products: firmware on ESP32/STM32, on-device ML with TinyML, cloud backends, and mobile/web control surfaces.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of AstroIntelli's embedded + AI capabilities.
- [Services](/services): Eight service domains across embedded, Edge AI, AIoT, cloud, mobile, automation and healthcare.
- [Training](/training): Project-based workshops on ESP32, TinyML, Edge AI and AIoT.
- [About](/about): Mission, principles and how AstroIntelli operates.
- [Contact](/contact): Start a project or request a workshop.

## Services

- [Embedded Systems Development](/services/embedded-systems): ESP32, STM32, firmware and sensor integration.
- [Edge AI & TinyML](/services/edge-ai-tinyml): ML models deployed directly on microcontrollers.
- [AIoT — AI of Things](/services/aiot): Connected, intelligent device platforms.
- [Product Development & Prototyping](/services/product-development): Concept to working MVP hardware.
- [Cloud & Backend Development](/services/cloud-backend): Scalable backends for connected device fleets.
- [Mobile & Web Applications](/services/mobile-web): Apps and dashboards for smart devices.
- [Industrial Automation](/services/industrial-automation): Predictive maintenance and condition monitoring.
- [Healthcare Technology](/services/healthcare): Connected medical and remote monitoring devices.
